info.name: DMart E-Commerce & Inventory API
info.description: Complete Postman collection for the DMart Inventory & E-Commerce API, structured into User (Customer) and Admin folders, preconfigured with authentication environments.

request.description: Registers a new user on the platform.
Authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.
Obtain a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Invalidates the current session's refresh token.
Revokes all refresh tokens issued to the logged-in user.
